note: v4 corpus (box). The Stack glsl broadened from fragment-only to all real GLSL (117,361). HLSL/Metal mostly filtered by the entry-point gate (different conventions). 196,418 unique shaders / ~230M real GPT-2 tokens (~2 chars/tok) / ~187M with the GLSL tokenizer. ~9x the original 22k-shader / 47.6M-token run. This is roughly the ceiling of public shader code; a 3.6B model still wants ~70B tokens (Chinchilla), which is why the DoRA-on-a-pretrained-base + debugger-RL path is the headline, not a from-scratch giant.
